_meta.note: Ratios are lift÷bodyweight anchors per tier (refrence Sections 4 & 6). Male anchors are authoritative; female anchors are derived via femaleFactor unless given explicitly. Bodyweight rep anchors live in exercise_repository.dart. Most entries have no bespoke image yet and fall back to the equipment icon.
_meta.attribution: Strength standards are ratio estimates. Powerlift percentiles can be recalibrated from OpenPowerlifting.org (public domain).
